eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Colorado; at 3:23 PM on AUG 19, 2019 Effective until 3:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS A TEST. This is a statewide required WEEKLY TEST of the emergency alert system, originating from the Colorado Office of Emergency Management. THIS IS ONLY A TEST.
